analysis.summary: Този анализ на ос MATERIALS_WASTE_REVIEW цели да постигне устойчивост в материалите и отходите. Целта е да се постигне устойчивост и да се гарантира достойнство за всички. Този анализ е важен за бъдещето на човечеството.

arxiv_papers.title: On Utility Maximization under Multivariate Fake Stationary Affine Volterra Models
arxiv_papers.snippet: This paper is concerned with Merton's portfolio optimization problem in a Volterra stochastic environment described by a multivariate fake stationary Volterra--Heston model. arxiv_papers.snippet: In this paper, we propose Agentar-Fin-OCR, a document parsing system tailored to financial-domain documents, transforming ultra-long financial PDFs into semantically consistent, highly accurate, structured outputs with auditing-grade provenance.
